[[Category:dd]][[Category:dd]][[ja:若宮神社]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine.
== See Also == * {{ill|Wakamiya (disambiguation)|ja|若宮 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (disambiguation)|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu (disambiguation)|ja|若宮八幡宮 (曖昧さ回避)}}

[[Category:dd]][[Category:dd]][[ja:若宮神社]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.

=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine.

==== 熊本県 ==== * [[若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)|若宮神社]] – [[熊本県]][[熊本市]][[中央区 (熊本市)|中央区]]神水本町 * [[若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)|若宮神社]] – 熊本県熊本市中央区出水 * [[若宮神社 (熊本市東区)|若宮神社]] – 熊本県熊本市[[東区 (熊本市)|東区]]小山 * [[若宮神社 (熊本市西区)|若宮神社]] – 熊本県熊本市[[西区 (熊本市)|西区]]花園 * [[若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)|若宮神社]] – 熊本県熊本市[[南区 (熊本市)|南区]]富合町小岩瀬 * [[若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)|若宮神社]] – 熊本県熊本市南区御幸木部 * [[若宮神社 (八代市)|若宮神社]] – 熊本県[[八代市]]東陽町南 * [[富若宮神社]] – 熊本県[[菊池市]]泗水町吉富 * [[東山若宮神社]] – 熊本県[[山鹿市]]寺島 * [[若宮神社 (美里町)|若宮神社]] – 熊本県[[下益城郡]][[美里町 (熊本県)|美里町]]馬場 * [[若宮神社 (御船町)|若宮神社]] – 熊本県下益城郡[[御船町]]辺田見

[[Category:dd]][[Category:dd]][[ja:若宮神社]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市}}, Minamishinano Wada.

=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.

== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine.

revision.text:
[[Category:dd]][[Category:dd]][[ja:若宮神社]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine.
== See Also == * {{ill|Wakamiya (disambiguation)|ja|若宮 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (disambiguation)|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu (disambiguation)|ja|若宮八幡宮 (曖昧さ回避)}}

revision.text:
'''若宮神社'''（わかみやじんじゃ）は、｢若宮」を社名に持つ[[神社]]。
== 主な若宮神社 ==
=== 北海道・東北地方 ===
* [[若宮神社 (江差町)|若宮神社]] – [[北海道]][[檜山郡]][[江差町]]小黒部町
=== 関東地方 === * [[若宮神社 (日光市)|若宮神社]] – [[栃木県]][[日光市]]湯西川 * [[若宮神社 (本庄市)|若宮神社]] – [[埼玉県]][[本庄市]]児玉町 * [[若宮神社 (八街市)|若宮神社]] – [[千葉県]][[八街市]]大関 * [[若宮神社 (日野市高幡)|若宮神社]] – [[東京都]][[日野市]]高幡 * [[若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|若宮神社]] – 東京都日野市東豊田 ： 明神様、豊田総鎮守 * [[若宮神社 (三浦市)|若宮神社]] – [[神奈川県]][[三浦市]]初声町 * [[若宮神社 (愛川町)|若宮神社]] – 神奈川県[[愛甲郡]][[愛川町]]半原
=== 中部地方 === * [[若宮神社 (新潟市西区)|若宮神社]] – [[新潟県]][[新潟市]][[西区 (新潟市)|西区]][[五十嵐 (新潟市)|五十嵐]] * [[若宮神社 (新潟市西蒲区)|若宮神社]] – 新潟県新潟市[[西蒲区]][[松野尾 (新潟市)|松野尾]] * [[若宮神社 (金沢市)|若宮神社]] – [[石川県]][[金沢市]]若宮 * [[若宮神社 (小浜市相生)|若宮神社]] – [[福井県]][[小浜市]]相生 * [[若宮神社 (南アルプス市飯野)|若宮神社]] – [[山梨県]][[南アルプス市]]飯野 * [[若宮神社 (長野市)|若宮神社]] – [[長野県]][[長野市]]上松 * [[若宮神社 (飯田市)|若宮神社]] – 長野県[[飯田市]]南信濃和田 * [[若宮神社 (塩尻市)|若宮神社]] – 長野県[[塩尻市]]奈良井 * [[若宮神社 (下諏訪町)|若宮神社]] – 長野県[[諏訪郡]][[下諏訪町]]若宮 * [[若宮神社 (岐阜市柳津町)|若宮神社]] – [[岐阜県]][[岐阜市]]柳津町 * [[若宮神社 (岐阜市芥見大退)|若宮神社]] – 岐阜県岐阜市芥見大退 * [[若宮神社 (瑞浪市土岐町)|若宮神社]] – 岐阜県[[瑞浪市]]土岐町 * [[若宮神社 (土岐市)|若宮神社]] – 岐阜県[[土岐市]]下石町 * [[若宮神社 (各務原市山脇町)|若宮神社]] – 岐阜県[[各務原市]][[山脇町 (各務原市)|山脇町]] * [[若宮神社 (各務原市下切町)|若宮神社]] – 岐阜県各務原市[[下切町 (各務原市)|下切町]]
==== 静岡県 ==== * [[若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)|若宮神社]] – [[静岡県]][[浜松市]][[中央区 (浜松市)|中央区]]神ヶ谷町 * [[若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大工町)|若宮神社]] – 静岡県浜松市中央区大工町 * [[若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)|若宮神社]] – 静岡県浜松市中央区大瀬町 * [[若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)|若宮神社]] – 静岡県浜松市[[浜名区]][[引佐町別所]] * [[若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)|若宮神社]] – 静岡県浜松市浜名区[[引佐町花平]] * [[若宮神社 (磐田市家田)|若宮神社]] – 静岡県[[磐田市]]家田 * [[若宮神社 (磐田市合代島)|若宮神社]] – 静岡県磐田市合代島 * [[若宮神社 (掛川市)|若宮神社]] – 静岡県[[掛川市]][[大渕 (掛川市)|大渕]] * [[若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)|若宮神社]] – 静岡県掛川市逆川 * [[若宮神社 (掛川市日坂)|若宮神社]] – 静岡県掛川市日坂 * [[若宮神社 (牧之原市)|若宮神社]] – 静岡県[[牧之原市]]地頭方 * [[若宮神社 (南伊豆町湊)|若宮神社]] – 静岡県[[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]湊
==== 愛知県 ==== * [[若宮神社 (豊橋市牟呂水神町)|若宮神社]] – [[愛知県]][[豊橋市]][[牟呂水神町]] * [[若宮神社 (一宮市)|若宮神社]] – 愛知県[[一宮市]][[西萩原]] * [[若宮神社 (半田市)|若宮神社]] – 愛知県[[半田市]][[乙川若宮町]] * [[若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)|若宮神社]] – 愛知県[[豊川市]][[東上町 (豊川市)|東上町]]炭焼 * [[若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)|若宮神社]] – 愛知県豊川市東上町丸塚 * [[若宮神社 (安城市)|若宮神社]] – 愛知県[[安城市]][[東明町 (安城市)|東明町]] * [[若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)|若宮神社]] – 愛知県[[蒲郡市]][[三谷町 (蒲郡市)|三谷町]] * [[若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)|若宮神社]] – 愛知県蒲郡市[[神ノ郷町]] * [[若宮神社 (蒲郡市溝下)|若宮神社]] – 愛知県蒲郡市溝下 * [[若宮神社 (蒲郡市壱町田)|若宮神社]] – 愛知県蒲郡市壱町田 * [[若宮神社 (田原市)|若宮神社]] – 愛知県[[田原市]][[神戸町 (田原市)|神戸町]] * [[若宮神社 (北名古屋市)|若宮神社]] – 愛知県[[北名古屋市]][[鹿田 (北名古屋市)|鹿田]]

[[Category:dd]][[Category:dd]][[ja:若宮神社]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

[[Category:dd]][[Category:dd]][[ja:若宮神社]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.

=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮}}.

== Shikoku Region ==

'''若宮神社'''（わかみやじんじゃ）は、｢若宮」を社名に持つ[[神社]]。
== 主な若宮神社 ==
=== 北海道・東北地方 ===

[[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]][[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]][[ja:若宮神社]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

[[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]][[Category:disambiguation pages requiring recategorization]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.

[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine.

[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.

=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, Yanagitsu-cho.

=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|Kasuga-taisha}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.

Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.

[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|Kasuga-taisha}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine.
== See Also == * {{ill|Wakamiya (disambiguation)|ja|若宮 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (disambiguation)|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu (disambiguation)|ja|若宮八幡宮 (曖昧さ回避)}}

[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|1=Kasuga-taisha}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine.== See Also == * {{ill|Wakamiya (disambiguation)|ja|若宮 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (disambiguation)|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu (disambiguation)|ja|若宮八幡宮 (曖昧さ回避)}}

[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市}}.

[[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]][[ja:若宮神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|1=Kasuga-taisha}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine. == See Also == * {{ill|Wakamiya (disambiguation)|ja|若宮 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (disambiguation)|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu (disambiguation)|ja|若宮八幡宮 (曖昧さ回避)}}

== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==

=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine. == See Also == * {{ill|Wakamiya (disambiguation)|ja|若宮 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (disambiguation)|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu (disambiguation)|ja|若宮八幡宮 (曖昧さ回避)}}

revision.text:
'''若宮神社'''（わかみやじんじゃ）は、｢若宮」を社名に持つ[[神社]]。
== 主な若宮神社 == === 北海道・東北地方 === * [[若宮神社 (江差町)]] - [[北海道]][[檜山郡]][[江差町]]小黒部町
=== 関東地方 === * [[若宮神社 (日光市)]] - [[栃木県]][[日光市]]湯西川 * [[若宮神社 (本庄市)]] - [[埼玉県]][[本庄市]]児玉町 * [[若宮神社 (八街市)]] - [[千葉県]][[八街市]]大関 * [[若宮神社 (日野市高幡)]] - [[東京都]][[日野市]]高幡 * [[若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)]] - 東京都日野市東豊田（明神様、豊田総鎮守） * [[若宮神社 (三浦市)]] - [[神奈川県]][[三浦市]]初声町 * [[若宮神社 (愛川町)]] - 神奈川県[[愛甲郡]][[愛川町]]半原
=== 中部地方 === * [[若宮神社 (新潟市西区)]] - [[新潟県]][[新潟市]][[西区 (新潟市)|西区]][[五十嵐 (新潟市)|五十嵐]] * [[若宮神社 (新潟市西蒲区)]] - 新潟県新潟市[[西蒲区]][[松野尾 (新潟市)|松野尾]] * [[若宮神社 (金沢市)]] - [[石川県]][[金沢市]]若宮 * [[若宮神社 (小浜市相生)]] - [[福井県]][[小浜市]]相生 * [[若宮神社 (南アルプス市飯野)]] - [[山梨県]][[南アルプス市]]飯野 * [[若宮神社 (長野市)]] - [[長野県]][[長野市]]上松 * [[若宮神社 (飯田市)]] - 長野県[[飯田市]]南信濃和田 * [[若宮神社 (塩尻市)]] - 長野県[[塩尻市]]奈良井 * [[若宮神社 (下諏訪町)]] - 長野県[[諏訪郡]][[下諏訪町]]若宮 * [[若宮神社 (岐阜市柳津町)]] - [[岐阜県]][[岐阜市]]柳津町 * [[若宮神社 (岐阜市芥見大退)]] - 岐阜県岐阜市芥見大退 * [[若宮神社 (瑞浪市土岐町)]] - 岐阜県[[瑞浪市]]土岐町 * [[若宮神社 (土岐市)]] - 岐阜県[[土岐市]]下石町 * [[若宮神社 (各務原市山脇町)]] - 岐阜県[[各務原市]][[山脇町 (各務原市)|山脇町]]・[[下切町 (各務原市)|下切町]]
==== 静岡県 ==== * [[若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)]] - [[静岡県]][[浜松市]][[中央区 (浜松市)|中央区]]神ヶ谷町 * [[若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大工町)]] - 静岡県浜松市中央区大工町 * [[若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)]] - 静岡県浜松市中央区大瀬町 * [[若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)]] - 静岡県浜松市[[浜名区]][[引佐町別所]] * [[若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)]] - 静岡県浜松市浜名区[[引佐町花平]] * [[若宮神社 (磐田市家田)]] - 静岡県[[磐田市]]家田 * [[若宮神社 (磐田市合代島)]] - 静岡県磐田市合代島 * [[若宮神社 (掛川市)]] - 静岡県[[掛川市]][[大渕 (掛川市)|大渕]] * [[若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)]] - 静岡県掛川市逆川 * [[若宮神社 (掛川市日坂)]] - 静岡県掛川市日坂 * [[若宮神社 (牧之原市)]] - 静岡県[[牧之原市]]地頭方 * [[若宮神社 (南伊豆町湊)]] - 静岡県[[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]湊
==== 愛知県 ==== * [[若宮神社 (豊橋市牟呂水神町)]] - [[愛知県]][[豊橋市]][[牟呂水神町]] * [[若宮神社 (一宮市)]] - 愛知県[[一宮市]][[西萩原]] * [[若宮神社 (半田市)]] - 愛知県[[半田市]][[乙川若宮町]] * [[若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)]] - 愛知県[[豊川市]][[東上町 (豊川市)|東上町]]炭焼 * [[若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)]] - 愛知県豊川市東上町丸塚 * [[若宮神社 (安城市)]] - 愛知県[[安城市]][[東明町 (安城市)|東明町]] * [[若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)]] - 愛知県[[蒲郡市]][[三谷町 (蒲郡市)|三谷町]] * [[若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)]] - 愛知県蒲郡市[[神ノ郷町]] * [[若宮神社 (蒲郡市溝下)]] - 愛知県蒲郡市溝下 * [[若宮神社 (蒲郡市壱町田)]] - 愛知県蒲郡市壱町田 * [[若宮神社 (田原市)]] - 愛知県[[田原市]][[神戸町 (田原市)|神戸町]] * [[若宮神社 (北名古屋市)]] - 愛知県[[北名古屋市]][[鹿田 (北名古屋市)|鹿田]]
=== 近畿地方 === * [[若宮神社 (鳥羽市)]] - [[三重県]][[鳥羽市]]坂手町 * [[若宮神社 (大紀町)]] - 三重県[[度会郡]][[大紀町]]滝原（[[瀧原宮]]所管社） * [[若宮神社 (甲賀市土山町)]] - [[滋賀県]][[甲賀市]]土山町 * [[若宮神社 (甲賀市水口町)]] - 滋賀県甲賀市水口町 * [[若宮神社 (京都市北区)]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]][[北区 (東京都)|北区]]紫野雲林院町 * [[若宮神社 (綾部市)]] - 京都府[[綾部市]]上野町藤 * [[若宮神社 (亀岡市)]] - 京都府[[亀岡市]]河原林町 * [[若宮神社 (枚方市)]] - [[大阪府]][[枚方市]]杉 * [[若宮神社 (交野市)]] - 大阪府[[交野市]]私市 * [[若宮神社 (神戸市灘区)]] - [[兵庫県]][[神戸市]][[灘区]][[新在家南町]] * [[若宮神社 (三木市)]] - 兵庫県[[三木市]][[吉川町 (兵庫県)|吉川町]] * [[若宮神社 (奈良市雑司町)]] - [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]雑司町 （[[春日大社]]摂社、重要文化財） * [[春日若宮神社]] - 奈良県奈良市南永井町 * [[若宮神社 (湯浅町)]] - [[和歌山県]][[有田郡]][[湯浅町]]青木 * [[若宮神社 (古座川町)]] - 和歌山県[[東牟婁郡]][[古座川町]]添野川
=== 中国地方 === * [[若宮神社 (出雲市西代町)]] - [[島根県]][[出雲市]]西代町 * [[若宮神社 (出雲市斐川町)]] - 島根県出雲市斐川町 * [[若宮神社 (出雲市湖陵町)]] - 島根県出雲市湖陵町 * [[若宮神社 (安来市飯梨町)]] - 島根県[[安来市]]飯梨町 * [[若宮神社 (矢掛町)]] - [[岡山県]][[小田郡]][[矢掛町]]江良 * [[若宮神社 (東広島市西条町)]] - [[広島県]][[東広島市]]西条町 * [[若宮神社 (熊野町)]] - 広島県[[安芸郡 (広島県)|安芸郡]][[熊野町]]初神 * [[若宮神社 (下関市吉母)]] - [[山口県]][[下関市]]吉母 * [[若宮神社 (下関市豊浦町)]] - 山口県下関市豊浦町
=== 四国地方 === * [[若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)]] - [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[一宮町 (徳島市)|一宮町]] * [[若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)]] - 徳島県徳島市[[南佐古]] * [[若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)]] - 徳島県徳島市[[応神町吉成]] * [[若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)]] - 徳島県徳島市[[沖浜町 (徳島市)|沖浜町]] * [[若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)]] - 徳島県徳島市[[国府町北岩延]] * [[若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)]] - 徳島県[[阿波市]][[市場町市場]] * [[若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)]] - 徳島県阿波市[[市場町日開谷]] * [[若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)]] - 徳島県阿波市[[吉野町西条]] * [[若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)]] - 徳島県阿波市[[吉野町柿原]] * [[若宮神社 (観音寺市出作町)]] - [[香川県]][[観音寺市]]出作町 * [[八幡若宮神社]] - [[愛媛県]][[松山市]][[玉谷町]] * [[若宮神社 (四国中央市)]] - 愛媛県[[四国中央市]]妻鳥 * [[若宮神社 (いの町上八川丙)]] - [[高知県]][[吾川郡]][[いの町]]上八川
=== 九州地方 === * [[若宮神社 (福岡市中央区)]] - [[福岡県]][[福岡市]][[中央区 (福岡市)|中央区]][[今泉 (福岡市)|今泉]] * [[若宮神社 (糸島市)]] - 福岡県[[糸島市]]志摩船越（旧名：桜谷神社） * [[若宮神社 (新宮町)]] - 福岡県[[糟屋郡]][[新宮町]]相島（相島若宮神社） * [[若宮神社 (唐津市)]] - [[佐賀県]][[唐津市]]厳木町 * [[若宮神社 (神埼市原の町)]] - 佐賀県[[神埼市]]原の町 * [[若宮神社 (壱岐市勝本町立石仲触)]] - [[長崎県]][[壱岐市]]勝本町立石仲触 * [[若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)]] - [[熊本県]][[熊本市]][[中央区 (熊本市)|中央区]]神水本町 * [[若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)]] - 熊本県熊本市中央区出水 * [[若宮神社 (熊本市東区)]] - 熊本県熊本市[[東区 (熊本市)|東区]]小山 * [[若宮神社 (熊本市西区)]] - 熊本県熊本市[[西区 (熊本市)|西区]]花園 * [[若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)]] - 熊本県熊本市[[南区 (熊本市)|南区]]富合町 * [[若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)]] - 熊本県熊本市南区御幸木部 * [[若宮神社 (八代市)]] - 熊本県[[八代市]]東陽町南 * [[東山若宮神社]] - 熊本県[[山鹿市]]寺島 * [[富若宮神社]] - 熊本県[[菊池市]]泗水町吉富 * [[若宮神社 (美里町)]] - 熊本県[[下益城郡]][[美里町 (熊本県)|美里町]]馬場 * [[若宮神社 (御船町)]] - 熊本県[[上益城郡]][[御船町]]辺田見 * [[竹田若宮神社]] - [[大分県]][[日田市]]若宮町 * [[若宮神社 (宇佐市南宇佐)]] - 大分県[[宇佐市]]南宇佐（[[宇佐神宮]]摂社） * [[志加若宮神社]] - 大分県[[豊後大野市]]朝地町 * [[若宮神社 (串間市)]] - [[宮崎県]][[串間市]]西方 * [[若宮神社 (鹿児島市)]] - [[鹿児島県]][[鹿児島市]][[池之上町]] * [[若宮神社 (霧島市)]] - 鹿児島県[[霧島市]]霧島田口
== 関連項目 == * [[若宮社]] * [[若宮八幡宮]] * [[若宮]]
