revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|1=Kasuga-taisha}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine. == See Also == * {{ill|Wakamiya (disambiguation)|ja|若宮 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (disambiguation)|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu (disambiguation)|ja|若宮八幡宮 (曖昧さ回避)}}

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|12=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|12=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市|12=draft}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市|12=draft}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市|12=draft}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)|12=draft}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市|12=draft}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市|12=draft}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市|12=draft}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市|12=draft}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市|12=draft}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市|12=draft}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)|12=draft}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市|12=draft}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)|12=draft}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市|12=draft}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市|12=draft}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市|12=draft}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市|12=draft}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市|12=draft}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市|12=draft}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡|12=draft}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮|12=draft}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市|12=draft}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市|12=draft}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市|12=draft}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)|12=draft}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社|12=draft}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|1=Kasuga-taisha|12=draft}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市|12=draft}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市|12=draft}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市|12=draft}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市|12=draft}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町|12=draft}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市|12=draft}}, Funakoshi. '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|12=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|12=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市|12=draft}}, Minamishinano Wada.

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|12=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|12=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|12=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|12=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|12=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|12=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市|12=draft}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市|12=draft}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市|12=draft}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)|12=draft}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市|12=draft}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市|12=draft}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市|12=draft}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市|12=draft}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市|12=draft}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市|12=draft}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)|12=draft}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市|12=draft}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)|12=draft}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市|12=draft}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市|12=draft}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市|12=draft}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市|12=draft}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市|12=draft}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市|12=draft}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Daiki)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡|12=draft}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮|12=draft}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市|12=draft}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市|12=draft}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市|12=draft}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)|12=draft}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社|12=draft}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|1=Kasuga-taisha|12=draft}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市|12=draft}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市|12=draft}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市|12=draft}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市|12=draft}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町|12=draft}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市|12=draft}}, Funakoshi. === Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市|12=draft}}.

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|12=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|12=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|12=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|12=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市|12=draft}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市|12=draft}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市|12=draft}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)|12=draft}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市|12=draft}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市|12=draft}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市|12=draft}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)|12=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市|12=draft}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市|12=draft}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市|12=draft}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)|12=draft}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市|12=draft}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)|12=draft}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市|12=draft}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市|12=draft}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市|12=draft}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市|12=draft}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市|12=draft}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市|12=draft}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Taiki, Mie)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡|12=draft}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮|12=draft}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市|12=draft}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市|12=draft}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市|12=draft}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)|12=draft}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社|12=draft}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|1=Kasuga-taisha|12=draft}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市|12=draft}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市|12=draft}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市|12=draft}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市|12=draft}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町|12=draft}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市|12=draft}}, Funakoshi. === Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市|12=draft}}.

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|12=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|12=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

== Kansai Region ==

=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市|12=draft}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市|12=draft}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).

=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)|12=draft}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社|12=draft}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|1=Kasuga-taisha|12=draft}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市|12=draft}}.

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft|12=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==

=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.

=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市|12=draft|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Taiki, Mie)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮|12=draft|12=draft}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市|12=draft|12=draft}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市|12=draft|12=draft}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)|12=draft|12=draft}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|1=Kasuga-taisha|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.

Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft|12=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|12=draft|12=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine. == See Also == * {{ill|Wakamiya (disambiguation)|ja|若宮 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (disambiguation)|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu (disambiguation)|ja|若宮八幡宮 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}

[[sn:若宮神社]]

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyohashi City|ja|豊橋市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tahara City|ja|田原市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa City|ja|豊川市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Anjo City|ja|安城市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Ichinomiya City|ja|一宮市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kitanagoya City|ja|北名古屋市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Handa City|ja|半田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Taiki, Mie)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Daiki Town|ja|大紀町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Watarai District|ja|度会郡|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Koka City|ja|甲賀市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Katano City|ja|交野市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyogo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Miki City|ja|三木市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|1=Kasuga-taisha|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Minami-Sako. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ojimmachi Yoshinari)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市応神町吉成)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Awa City (Tokushima)|ja|阿波市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Fukuoka City|ja|福岡市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)|ja|新宮町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Itoshima City|ja|糸島市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Funakoshi. Formerly known as Sakura-dani Shrine.
=== Kumamoto Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区神水本町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kumamoto City|ja|熊本市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Central Ward, Kamimizu Honmachi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Chuo Ward, Izumi)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市中央区出水)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Central Ward, Izumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Higashi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市東区)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Higashi Ward, Oyama. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Nishi Ward)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市西区)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Nishi Ward, Hanazono. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区城南町宮地)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Jonan-machi Miyaji. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区富合町小岩瀬)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Yatsushiro)|ja|若宮神社 (八代市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro City|ja|八代市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Misato Town (Kumamoto)|ja|美里町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Shimomashiki District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Mifune)|ja|若宮神社 (御船町)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Mifune Town|ja|御船町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Shimomashiki District.
=== Kagoshima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kagoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (鹿児島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Hita City|ja|日田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine. == See Also == * {{ill|Wakamiya (disambiguation)|ja|若宮 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (disambiguation)|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu (disambiguation)|ja|若宮八幡宮 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrines|qq=}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrines|qq=}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino City|qq=}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|qq=}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrines|qq=}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino City|qq=}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|qq=}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrines|qq=}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Hino City|ja|日野市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino City|qq=}}, Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|qq=}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Iida City|ja|飯田市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iida City|qq=}}, Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Niigata City|ja|新潟市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niigata City|qq=}}, Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kakegawa City|ja|掛川市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakegawa City|qq=}}, Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|qq=}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Makinohara City|ja|牧之原市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makinohara City|qq=}}, Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata City|ja|磐田市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwata City|qq=}}, Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Hamamatsu City|ja|浜松市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamamatsu City|qq=}}, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|qq=}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|qq=}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|qq=}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Gamagori City|ja|蒲郡市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamagori City|qq=}}, Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|qq=}} - === Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toki City|ja|土岐市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toki City|qq=}}, Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakamigahara City|qq=}}, Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gifu City|qq=}}, Yanagitsu-cho.

=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|qq=}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sessha|qq=}} of {{ill|Kasuga Taisha|ja|春日大社|1=Kasuga-taisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Taisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-taisha|qq=}} in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nara City|qq=}}.

Located in Kumamoto City, Minami Ward, Tomiai-machi Koiwase. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|ja|若宮神社 (熊本市南区御幸木部)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Kumamoto, Minami Ward, Miyuki Kibe)|qq=}} - revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Hino, Tokyo|Hino City]], Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|qq=}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Iida, Nagano|Iida City]], Minamishinano Wada.

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Hino, Tokyo|Hino City]], Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|qq=}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.
== Chubu Region ==
=== Nagano Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|ja|若宮神社 (飯田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Iida)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Iida, Nagano|Iida City]], Minamishinano Wada.
=== Niigata Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|ja|若宮神社 (新潟市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Niigata)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Niigata (city)|Niigata City]], Nishi Ward, Ikarashi 2-no-cho.
=== Shizuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Obuchi)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kakegawa, Shizuoka|Kakegawa City]], Obuchi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|ja|若宮神社 (掛川市逆川)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Kakegawa, Sakagawa)|qq=}} - Located in Kakegawa City, Sakagawa. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|ja|若宮神社 (牧之原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Makinohara)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Makinohara|Makinohara City]], Jitogata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|ja|若宮神社 (磐田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Iwata)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Iwata, Shizuoka|Iwata City]], Ieda. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町別所)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Bessho)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Hamamatsu|Hamamatsu City]], Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Bessho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市浜名区引佐町花平)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Inasa-Hanadaira)|qq=}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Hamana Ward, Inasa-cho Hanadaira. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区神ヶ谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Kamigaya)|qq=}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Kamigaya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区富塚町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Tomitsuka)|qq=}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Tomitsuka-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|ja|若宮神社 (浜松市中央区大瀬町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hamamatsu, Chuo-Oze)|qq=}} - Located in Hamamatsu City, Central Ward, Oze-cho.
=== Aichi Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|若宮神社 (豊橋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Toyohashi)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Toyohashi|Toyohashi City]], Muro Suijin-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|ja|若宮神社 (田原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Tahara)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Tahara, Aichi|Tahara City]], Kamiko-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町炭焼)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Tsumiyaki)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Toyokawa, Aichi|Toyokawa City]], Higashiue-cho Tsumiyaki. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|ja|若宮神社 (豊川市東上町丸塚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Toyokawa, Higashiue-Marutsuka)|qq=}} - Located in Toyokawa City, Higashiue-cho Marutsuka. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市三谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Mitani)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Gamagōri|Gamagori City]], Mitani-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|ja|若宮神社 (蒲郡市神ノ郷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Gamagori, Kaminogo)|qq=}} - Located in Gamagori City, Kaminogo-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|ja|若宮神社 (安城市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Anjo)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Anjō|Anjo City]], Tomei-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|若宮神社 (一宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Ichinomiya)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Ichinomiya, Aichi|Ichinomiya City]], Nishi-Hagiwara Wakamiya-kita. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|ja|若宮神社 (北名古屋市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Kitanagoya)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kitanagoya|Kitanagoya City]]. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|ja|若宮神社 (半田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Handa)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Handa, Aichi|Handa City]], Otsukawa Wakamiya-cho.
=== Gifu Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|ja|若宮神社 (土岐市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Toki)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Toki, Gifu|Toki City]], Shimoishi-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|若宮神社 (各務原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]], Shimokiri-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|ja|若宮神社 (岐阜市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Gifu)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Gifu|Gifu City]], Yanagitsu-cho.
== Kansai Region ==
=== Mie Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Taiki, Mie)|ja|若宮神社 (大紀町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Taiki, Mie)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Taiki, Mie|Daiki Town]], [[:en:Watarai District, Mie|Watarai District]], associated with {{ill|Takihara-no-Miya|ja|瀧原宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takihara-no-Miya|qq=}}.
=== Shiga Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|ja|若宮神社 (甲賀市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Koka)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kōka, Shiga|Koka City]], Tsuchiyama-cho Oikawa.
=== Osaka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|ja|若宮神社 (交野市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Katano)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Katano|Katano City]], 私市 (Kisaichi).
=== Hyōgo Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|ja|若宮神社 (三木市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Miki)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Miki, Hyōgo|Miki City]], 吉川町 (Yoshikawa-cho).
=== Nara Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|ja|若宮神社 (奈良市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Nara)|qq=}} - A {{ill|sessha|ja|摂社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sessha|qq=}} of [[:en:Kasuga-taisha|Kasuga-taisha]] in [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]].
== Shikoku Region ==
=== Tokushima Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市一宮町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Ichinomiya-cho)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Tokushima (city)|Tokushima City]], Ichinomiya-cho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市南佐古)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Minami-Sako)|qq=}} - Located in Tokushima City, Ojimmachi Yoshinari. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市沖浜町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Okinahamacho)|qq=}} - Located in Tokushima City, Okinahamacho. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|ja|若宮神社 (徳島市国府町北岩延)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Tokushima, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe)|qq=}} - Located in Tokushima City, Kokufucho Kita-Iwanobe. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町市場)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Ichiba)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Awa, Tokushima|Awa City (Tokushima)]], Ichibamachi Ichiba. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市市場町日開谷)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Ichibamachi Higaidani)|qq=}} - Located in Awa City, Ichibamachi Higaidani. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町西条)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Nishijo)|qq=}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Nishijo. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|ja|若宮神社 (阿波市吉野町柿原)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Awa, Yoshinomachi Kakihara)|qq=}} - Located in Awa City, Yoshinomachi Kakihara.
== Kyushu Region ==
=== Fukuoka Prefecture === * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|若宮神社 (福岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Fukuoka)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Fukuoka|Fukuoka City]], Imaizumi. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|ja|若宮神社 (新宮町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Shingu)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Shingū, Fukuoka|Shingu Town (Fukuoka)]], Kasuya District. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|若宮神社 (糸島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Itoshima)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Itoshima, Fukuoka|Itoshima City]], Funakoshi. '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Hino, Tokyo|Hino City]], Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11616280]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11616280]] Wikidata name: [[Category:Add wikidata]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11616280]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11616280]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11616280]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]

Located in [[:en:Yatsushiro|Yatsushiro City]]. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|ja|若宮神社 (美里町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|1=Wakamiya Shrine (Misato)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616283}} - Located in [[:en:Mifune, Kumamoto|Mifune Town]], Shimomashiki District.

== Nicknames == * The {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja|若八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachimangu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Hita, Ōita|Hita City]], Oita Prefecture, is colloquially referred to as Wakamiya Shrine. == See Also == * {{ill|Wakamiya (disambiguation)|ja|若宮 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 若宮|1=Wakamiya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q100249640}} * {{ill|Wakamiya-sha (disambiguation)|ja|若宮社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya-sha (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 若宮社|1=Wakamiya Sha (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616278}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachimangu (disambiguation)|ja|若宮八幡宮 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachimangu (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 若宮八幡宮|1=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616249}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:若宮神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11616280]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市高畑)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Takahata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Hino, Tokyo|Hino City]], Tokyo, Takahata. * {{ill|Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja|若宮神社 (日野市東豊田)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Shrine (Hino, Higashitoyoda)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hino City, Higashitoyoda.

revision.text:
'''Wakamiya Shrine''' (若宮神社, Wakamiya Jinja) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}} located across Japan. Most notably [[Wakamiya Shrine (Shimonoseki)]]
